title: sideritis hyssopifolia var. villarsii
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia var. villarsii, also known as mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Sideritis and is native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis hyssopifolia var. villarsii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Sideritis hyssopifolia var. villarsii can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used to make infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
